overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a covered walkway past holographic billboards and food stalls, through an open plaza, under an overpass, and along city streets with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with reflective wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered walkway toward large holographic billboard

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying a woman with blue hair and white outfit
black metal railing with triangular supports running along the right side of the path
tall palm trees lining the walkway ahead
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered walkway with wet reflective pavement. A massive holographic billboard of a blue-haired woman dominates the view ahead, while palm trees and glass skyscrapers line the path. The camera moves forward steadily through this neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with food stalls and outdoor seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza passing food stalls on the right and looking at seating areas

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall counter wearing white shirt

entered.detail: small outdoor food vendor stall with red awning and cooking equipment
plastic red chairs and small tables arranged in the plaza
large digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open plaza with wet pavement reflecting neon lights. Food stalls and red plastic seating occupy the space, while a vendor stands behind a counter. The holographic billboard shifts to the left as the camera moves deeper into the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional space under yellow elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters area beneath yellow overpass structure with concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the street level exit

entered.detail: large elevated highway with yellow structural beams and concrete deck
thick cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overpass
illuminated billboard with pink and red graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a massive yellow overpass structure supported by thick concrete pillars. The lighting shifts to artificial under the bridge, with digital billboards visible ahead. The space feels enclosed and industrial compared to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with orange safety railings and neon storefronts

events.description: exits underpass onto open sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing other pedestrians in same direction

notable_agents.action: person in red pants and dark jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street traffic
tall streetlights with bright white illumination
various illuminated business signs including green and pink neon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens to a city sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings. Street lamps illuminate the wet pavement while pedestrians walk ahead. Neon storefront signs line the right side of the street, and tall glass buildings rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide street intersection and building plaza with underpass

events.description: crosses from sidewalk onto street surface moving toward building entrance
approaches covered building entrance with sunken plaza area

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street and approaching a building underpass entrance

entered.detail: wide multi-lane street with yellow and red painted markings
large building entrance with covered walkway and illuminated interior
lowered plaza space with plants and seating visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide asphalt street toward a building underpass entrance. The orange railings and sidewalk fall behind as the scene opens to a large plaza area with a sunken section visible on the left. The camera approaches the illuminated building entrance as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a sheltered walkway into an expansive urban plaza and finally toward a large building entrance. It begins on a covered walkway with wet reflective pavement, gliding toward a massive holographic billboard of a blue-haired woman framed by palm trees and glass skyscrapers. As the camera moves forward, the corridor opens into a wide plaza filled with food stalls and red plastic seating, where the holographic display shifts to the side to reveal a bustling vendor. The scene then transitions into a more enclosed, industrial atmosphere as the camera passes beneath a massive yellow overpass supported by thick concrete pillars, before emerging onto a city sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings and glowing storefronts. Finally, the camera crosses a wide asphalt street, leaving the railings behind to approach an illuminated building entrance adjacent to a sunken plaza area.
